representatives.name: Miss Lo Sum-yee Rosa
representatives.role: SPP of the Department of Justice, for HKSAR

representatives.name: Mr Chung Boey
representatives.role: instructed by Eli K K Tsui & Co, assigned by DLA, for the 1st accused

representatives.name: Mr Lau Chung-man Clement
representatives.role: instructed by Raymond C P Lo & Co, assigned by DLA, for the 2nd accused

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug

offence_date.source: on an unknown date between December 2022 and the 27th day of December 2022, in a room in Yau Tong, they conspired to unlawfully traffic in cocaine.

place_of_offence.address: Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City in Kwun Tong
place_of_offence.source: at about 1.20 am on 27 December 2022, the police arrived at Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City in Kwun Tong as a result of a 999 call regarding a dispute.

trafficking_mode.source: Counsel said his role was more like a courier taking the drug from the Lei Yue Mun Plaza back to the room.

reasons_for_offence.source: Because the 1st defendant was indebted so he agreed. ... he owed debts in the region of $300,000. Counsel said he committed the present offence to earn quick money.

trafficking_mode.source: the 2nd defendant signed a tenancy agreement to rent the room ... he had rented the room and did not lock it, apparently for the purpose of allowing others to use it whenever they wanted.
